ai_tips: Starting out at 1006m — HR opened at 115 and stayed calm through the opening stretch, a patient warm-up. 从海拔1006米出发——心率从115起步，开场阶段保持平稳，是很有耐心的热身。
0.63km in — pace 4:04/km, HR 148 (99% of the run average) as the effort builds. 进行到0.63公里——配速4:04/公里，心率148（全程均值的99%），强度正在建立。
Halfway to the high point — 40m of the 122m climb done, grade here 9.6%, HR 161. Short, quick steps keep this efficient. 爬升至最高点过半——122米总爬升已完成40米，此处坡度9.6%，心率161。缩小步幅、加快步频会更省力。
High point of the route: 1128m at 3.31km, HR 144. From here the route mostly gives back. 全程最高点1128米，位于3.31公里处，心率144。此后路线总体向下。
Steepest descent of the day: -21.2% at 4.52km — you kept it controlled at 11:07/km, protecting the legs. 全天最陡的下坡：4.52公里处坡度-21.2%——你稳健控制在11:07/公里，保护了腿部。
4.63km — late-run check: pace 12:26/km, HR 135, effort showing as the pace slips. 4.63公里——后程检查：配速12:26/公里，心率135，疲劳显现，配速下滑。

Finished 4.86km in 35:52 (avg 7:23/km, avg HR 149, max 171, +129m). Next time, close with 2-3 minutes of easy jogging to bring HR down before stopping. 完成4.86公里，用时35:52（平均配速7:23/公里，平均心率149，最高171，爬升129米）。下次结尾慢跑2-3分钟，让心率降下来再停。
